allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('main:', d.get\('main',''\)\); print\('exports:', d.get\('exports',''\)\)")

Bash(echo "const e = require\('electron'\); console.log\('type from require:', typeof e\); console.log\('keys:', typeof e === 'object' ? Object.keys\(e\).slice\(0,5\) : 'not object'\); console.log\('val:', typeof e === 'string' ? e.substring\(0,80\) : 'N/A'\); if\(e && e.app\) { console.log\('app found'\); e.app.whenReady\(\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\('ready, process.type=', process.type\); e.app.quit\(\); }\); }")

Bash(echo "console.log\('globalThis keys with electron:', Object.keys\(globalThis\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('electron'\)\)\); console.log\('process.features:', process.features\); console.log\('process._linkedBinding:', typeof process._linkedBinding\)")
